name: shadcn
description: shadcn component-family adapter. Two lanes: the official shadcn skill (vendored from shadcn-ui/ui) for React projects via the shadcn CLI, registries, and MCP; and a basecoat skill for shadcn-look markup without React via pinned CDN or npm+Tailwind. Ships the official shadcn MCP server (npx shadcn@latest mcp) and a shared theme-contract reference (references/theme-contract.md) so a theme authored once serves both lanes. Vendored content is synced manually at pinned upstream commits; provenance in UPSTREAM.md.
